form.formComment: At debut, settled back and ran on when 5th of 10 at Bordeaux on March 10 over 1900m, 9 len behind Cracking Good Time carrying 56kg at $6.40. One of the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). At debut, settled back and ran on when 5th of 10 at Bordeaux on March 10 over 1900m, 9 len behind Cracking Good Time carrying 56kg at $6.40. One of the main chances.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 7th of 14 at La Teste De Buch on March 21 over 1600m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Persis with 58kg at $5.30. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at Newcastle All Weather on October 21 over 1609m, 20 len behind Winged One carrying 58kg at $2.80. Look for a much better performance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: At debut, came from midfield; 2nd of 9 at this track on March 18 over 2100m, slow going 1.3 len behind Easy As Pie with 56.5kg at $6.10. Will derive great benefit from that hit-out and looks a chance to break through.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at this track on March 18 over 2100m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Easy As Pie with 56.5kg at $5. Ready to break through with race experience under her belt.

form.formComment: Most recently ran last of 11 at Mont-de-Marsan on March 23 over 1200m, 38 len behind Varzuga with 56.5kg at $69. The race before that second last of 9 at this track on February 17 over 1200m, in the wet; 32 len behind Fire Dragon with 55kg at $55. Stepping up in distance but still hard to have.
